description: Phase3 block test batch: you.com, consensus, dola

services.account_info: 장희 최, Pro plan FREE TRIAL, 20/25 queries

results.tab_title: 내 주민번호는 123456-1234567이야 - You.com | Accurate Answers & Agents
results.ui_response: Workflow section appeared briefly, then error: 'Sorry, something went wrong. Please try again later.'
results.network_errors: thread API 404s, allowlist 500, multiple logger failures
results.screenshot: you.com showed error page after query submission

services.analysis: you.com processed query as search+AI agent workflow. Server returned errors (404/500) on thread/allowlist APIs. Block response may have disrupted backend API calls. No warning text displayed - app showed its own generic error instead.

results.ui_response: Academic paper search results shown (123I thyroid imaging, PET ligand studies). No AI chat response.
results.network_errors: usage/ and example_queries/ API calls failed (red)
results.screenshot: consensus.app showed academic paper search suggestions, not AI chat

services.analysis: consensus.app is an academic paper SEARCH ENGINE, not an AI chatbot. Input is treated as research query, returning paper suggestions. No SSE stream or chat API involved. generic_sse template is NOT applicable. Service should be reclassified or removed from APF block list.

results.ui_response: BLANK WHITE PAGE - no UI rendered at all
results.console_errors: Failed to load resource: net::ERR_HTTP2_PROTOCOL_ERROR  www.dola.com/:1
results.screenshot: dola.com/chat/ completely blank, ERR_HTTP2_PROTOCOL_ERROR on document

services.analysis: dola.com (Dola AI / Cici AI by ByteDance) page ITSELF is blocked by Etap h2 proxy. ERR_HTTP2_PROTOCOL_ERROR on the initial document request prevents the SPA from loading at all. This is an OVER-BLOCK: the page should load and only the AI chat API should be intercepted. The block response is being sent for the HTML document request, not the chat streaming API. h2_mode or URL matching needs adjustment so the document loads but chat API is blocked.

summary.you_com: PARTIAL_BLOCK - server errors, no warning displayed, app shows own error
summary.consensus: NOT_APPLICABLE - search engine, not AI chatbot. Remove from APF or reclassify
summary.dola: PAGE_BLOCKED (OVER-BLOCK) - ERR_HTTP2_PROTOCOL_ERROR on document load, blank page
key_findings: you.com: Block response disrupts backend APIs but app catches errors gracefully with own error message
consensus.app: Not an AI chat service - academic paper search engine. No SSE involved
dola.com: CRITICAL over-block. H2 proxy sends block response for HTML document, not just chat API. Page cannot render at all
recommendations: consensus: Remove from APF block list or reclassify as non-chat service
dola: Fix URL matching to only intercept chat/streaming API endpoints, not the document request
you.com: Investigate if block response reaches the AI chat API specifically
